message:
Fix Docker build by upgrading AWS SDK (#5816)

Fixes broken Docker builds caused by an outdated AWS SDK pin.

Docker builds failed with:

```text
error: 'CredentialProviderConfiguration' is not a member of 'Aws::Client::ClientConfiguration'
```

`scripts/debian/build-aws-sdk-cpp-package.sh` pinned `aws-sdk-cpp` to
1.11.449,
which is too old for the credential provider API now used in
`libtenzir/src/aws_credentials.cpp`.
